flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Warner University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.7k → $30.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Warner University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (34.9% vs 41.5%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Warner University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).
